title: MEG: Major Depression & Probabilistic Learning Task
description: This magnetoencephalography (MEG) dataset comprises recordings from 90 participants (38 controls, 52 with major depressive disorder) performing a probabilistic learning task. Using a 306-sensor Elekta Neuromag system, the study investigates the Reward Positivity component and associated ventromedial frontal cortex activity during reinforcement learning. The dataset reveals hypoactivation of ventromedial frontal cortex in major depressive disorder and supports investigation of neural reward processing abnormalities in this condition.
methods_description: MEG data were acquired using a 306-sensor Elekta Neuromag System during a probabilistic selection task. Participants were clinically characterized via SCID interview and stratified into control (n=38) and major depressive disorder (n=52) groups. The study examined the Reward Positivity component and ventromedial prefrontal cortex activity during reinforcement learning.
